name: Albondigas
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground pork, ground beef, egg, brown rice, half of the diced onion, and thyme together; form into small balls.
2. Bring water to a boil in a large pot. Add the meatballs and simmer on low heat for 1 hour.
3. Add chopped tomato, garlic, chili huerta, remaining onion, and yerba buena leaves. Simmer for an additional 35 minutes.
4. Sprinkle cumin over the mixture and let it simmer for another 10 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, soak a thick slice of French bread in a small amount of soup broth until very soft.
6. Blend the soaked bread with cumin until smooth.
7. Add the blended bread mixture to the pot and stir.
8. Next, add sliced carrots and peas. Continue simmering until all vegetables are tender.
9. Serve hot.
